chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ (عليه السلام) مَعَ يَزِيدَ
chapter_title.en: Hadith of Ali Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> with Yazeed<sup>la</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 234)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 234)
text: سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ الْمَلِكِ بْنَ أَعْيَنَ يَسْأَلُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) فَلَمْ يَزَلْ يُسَائِلُهُ حَتَّى قَالَ فَهَلَكَ النَّاسُ إِذاً قَالَ إِي وَ اللَّهِ يَا ابْنَ أَعْيَنَ فَهَلَكَ النَّاسُ أَجْمَعُونَ قُلْتُ مَنْ فِي الْمَشْرِقِ وَ مَنْ فِي الْمَغْرِبِ قَالَ إِنَّهَا فُتِحَتْ بِضَلَالٍ إِي وَ اللَّهِ لَهَلَكُوا إِلَّا ثَلَاثَةً.

en.hubeali: H 14804 – Al-Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al-Washa, from Abaan Bin Usman, from Al-haris Bin Al-Mugheira who said:

I heard Abdul Malik Bin Ayn ask Abu Abdullahasws and he did not stop asking until he said, ‘So the people are destroyed’. Heasws said: ‘Yes, by Allahazwj! O Ibn Ayn, all the people destroyed’. I said, ‘The ones who are in the east and the one who are in the west?’ Heasws said: ‘They have been conquered by the misguidance. Yes, by Allahazwj! They were destroyed except for three (Salmanar, Abu Dharrar and Al-Miqdadar)’.
en.sarwar: 357. Al-Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al-Washa, from Abaan Bin Usman, from Al-haris Bin Al-Mugheira who said: I heard Abdul Malik Bin Ayn ask Abu Abdullah (a.s.) and he did not stop asking until he said, ‘So the people are destroyed’. He (a.s.) said: ‘Yes, by Allah (azwj)! O Ibn Ayn, all the people destroyed’. I said, ‘The ones who are in the east and the one who are in the west?’ He (a.s.) said: ‘They have been conquered by the misguidance. Yes, by Allah (azwj)! They were destroyed except for three (Salman (ar), Abu Dharr (ar) and Al-Miqdad (ar))’.
